title: SV interfaces fail to synthesize depending on module order

features.name: interface as module port with member access
features.description: Code should include a submodule that takes an interface as a port and accesses a signal member of that interface

features.name: interface instantiation with named port connection
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation with a parameter, followed by a submodule instantiation using a named port connection to that interface

features.name: parameterized interface with logic member
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a parameter and a logic member
